Explainer.Title: How SeaMeet AI Works
Explainer.Subtitle: BYOK — Bring Your Own Key
Explainer.WhatIsBYOK: With BYOK, your recordings and data go directly from your device to Google or Anthropic. Nothing passes through SeaMeet servers — maximum privacy for you and your team.
Explainer.WhatYouNeed: What you'll set up after subscribing
Explainer.GeminiDesc: Powers live transcription, post-meeting summaries, and analysis. Google offers a generous free tier — most users never pay a cent.
Explainer.AgentTitle: AI Agent — choose one option (Limited Free)
Explainer.AgentOption1: GitHub Copilot — 50 free premium chats/month (or more with Copilot Pro)
Explainer.AgentOption2: Claude Code CLI — if you already have Claude Pro or Max, you're covered
Explainer.AgentOption3: Anthropic API key — for direct API access

WhyBYOK.Title: Why Bring Your Own Key?
WhyBYOK.Answer: Much better privacy — your data stays with trusted enterprises like Google and Anthropic, never SeaMeet. The free tiers from these providers are generous and will last most users a long time.

WhyMonthly.Title: Why does SeaMeet charge monthly?
WhyMonthly.Answer: SeaMeet updates rapidly with new AI features. Your subscription keeps you on the latest version. Without it, you'd pay a one-time license and be stuck with frozen features — like buying Office 2012 and staying on Office 2012 forever.

Coupon.Title: Launch Promotion
Coupon.BYOK100Desc: First month free — for the first 100 users
Coupon.FallbackDesc: If BYOK100 is used up, email coupon@seameet.ai to get another coupon (10% off for a year or another first-month-free code).
Coupon.HowToUse: Enter the coupon code at Stripe checkout.

PostSetup.Title: You're all set! Try it now.
PostSetup.Desc: Record a quick meeting or take a screenshot to experience AI transcription and analysis in action.

BYOK.GeminiUsage: Used for: transcription, summaries, live transcribe. Free keys are subject to Gemini rate limit and quota. Change to a Google AI Studio paid plan if running against the limit.
BYOK.SecurityNote: Keys are stored locally on your device (encrypted in your OS keychain). SeaMeet never sends your keys to our servers.
BYOK.Subtitle: One more step: connect your AI API keys.
BYOK.Step1Desc: Used for transcription, summaries, and live transcribe. Get a free key from Google AI Studio.
BYOK.Step2Desc: Used for AI questions and project analysis. Free credits for new accounts. Also included with Claude Pro or Max.

BYOK.StepCopilotDesc: GitHub Copilot detected on your system. Choose your preferred agent provider.
BYOK.CopilotFreeWarning: GitHub Copilot Free includes only 50 agent/chat requests per month. Great for a quick test, but you may hit the limit fast. Upgrade to Copilot Pro for higher limits, or use SeaMeet Desktop Pro for unlimited AI access.
BYOK.CopilotSignupHint: Want to try GitHub Copilot as an alternative agent? Sign up for a free plan at github.com/features/copilot/plans (includes 50 agent/chat requests per month), then install the Copilot CLI and run "copilot login".
BYOK.CopilotFlatUsage: Used for: AI agent (alternative to Claude). No API key needed — uses your GitHub login.

Device.LimitDescription: SeaMeet Pro works on up to 3 devices at a time. Sign out of a device you're not using to free up a slot.

Free.Q1: What can I do with the Free plan?
Free.A1: SeaMeet Free is a full-featured recorder and screenshot tool. You can record audio, capture screen video, take screenshots, and manage all your recordings — completely free, forever.
Free.A2: Yes. On the Free plan, no data is ever transmitted anywhere. All recordings, screenshots, and files stay 100% local on your device. Your privacy is fully protected.
Free.Q3: What more can I get with a paid plan?
Free.A3: Paid plans add AI-powered features: automatic transcription, meeting summaries, action items, live transcription during meetings, and AI-powered Q&A about your recordings.

BYOK.A1: BYOK stands for Bring Your Own Key. You'll need 2 API keys: one from Google AI Studio (for transcription & summaries) and one from Anthropic (for AI questions & analysis). Google AI Studio usually gives you a free key. If you have subscribed Claude Pro or Max plan, then you don't need an extra Anthropic API key. A guided setup wizard walks you through connecting both keys after checkout.
BYOK.A2: Your subscription funds continuous updates, new AI model support, bug fixes, and new features. API costs are paid separately to Google and Anthropic using your own keys.
BYOK.A3: 1 account, up to 3 devices. Inactive devices are automatically freed after 30 days. You can also manually sign out a device to free up a slot.

Desktop.A1: Desktop Pro includes built-in AI keys managed by SeaMeet — no need to create or manage your own API keys. Just subscribe and start using AI features immediately.
Desktop.Q2: How is it different from BYOK?
Desktop.A2: With Desktop Pro, SeaMeet provides and manages the API keys for you. You don't need to sign up for Google AI Studio or Anthropic separately.
Desktop.A3: 1 account, up to 3 devices. Inactive devices are automatically freed after 30 days. You can also manually sign out a device to free up a slot.

Sync.A1: Sync Pro includes everything in Desktop Pro, plus cloud sync. Your recordings, transcripts, and summaries are synced across all your devices.
Sync.A2: Recordings, transcripts, AI summaries, and action items are all synced across your devices. Changes on one device appear on all others.
Sync.A3: 1 account, up to 3 devices. Inactive devices are automatically freed after 30 days. You can also manually sign out a device to free up a slot.

Privacy.OneSentenceSummary: SeaMeet Desktop keeps all recordings on your device fully local and private, and requires no account. Cloud features are optional, encrypted, and fully under your control.
TLDRItems: SeaMeet Desktop is private by design: everything stays on your device; we don't collect audio, video, screen content, or meeting data.
No account needed to use desktop app's non‑AI features.
Anonymous diagnostics are optional — off by default, and never include recordings or personal content.
SeaMeet Cloud is optional: only if you choose to upload or record via cloud do we process audio, transcripts, and meeting metadata.
Cloud accounts store basic info (name, email) and usage data for security and service quality.
Third‑party integrations are optional and fully revocable.
We don't sell data, and cloud recordings are encrypted.
You control your data — delete recordings anytime or request full deletion.
Privacy.TLDRTitle: SeaMeet Privacy — TLDR for Busy Humans

ExplicitApproval.Description: Auto-detect will NEVER start a recording automatically without your explicit approval.
ExplicitApproval.Title: Explicit Approval Required

MicrophoneActivity.Description: Auto-detect monitors your microphone use to infer which app uses it. No data is captured.
MicrophoneActivity.Title: Microphone Activity Only

NoDataAccess.Description: Auto-detect only detects whether microphone is used or not. It does NOT access any recorded data.
NoDataAccess.Title: No Data Access

NoDataCollection.Description: SeaMeet does not collect ANY data from auto-detect feature without your consent.
NoDataCollection.Title: No Data Collection

EthicalUse.Description: Always inform and obtain consent from others before using Flashback to record them.
EthicalUse.Title: Ethical Use

LocalOnly.Description: Flashback runs entirely on your local machine. Nothing is synced to the cloud.
LocalOnly.Title: 100% Local

Protected.Description: Your privacy and security are paramount. Your data never leaves your device.
Protected.Title: Protected

RAMOnly.Description: All data stays in memory. Nothing is written to disk unless you save a Flashback recording.
RAMOnly.Title: RAM Only

Terms.OneSentenceSummary: SeaMeet is a free, privacy‑first recorder where local use requires no account, your data stays yours, cloud features are optional, and you must get consent before recording.
TLDRItems: SeaMeet Desktop is free — all non‑AI features work without an account or login.
Get consent before recording — SeaMeet doesn't check this for you.
Your recordings and transcripts are yours; SeaMeet only processes them to run as service.
Cloud features require an account and store data on SeaMeet servers.
Anonymous diagnostics are optional and can be turned off anytime.
Don't misuse of app (no illegal use, no hacking).
Service may change, and liability is limited.
Terms.TLDRTitle: SeaMeet Terms — TLDR for Busy Humans
